---
title: "Xiang Ao"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/xiangao
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/xiang-ao-01778/
---

## About

I am an applied economist and statistician with research interests in causal inference, econometrics, and policy evaluation. My work focuses on bridging the gap between modern statistical methods and applied research.

## Research Interests

- Causal inference 
- Machine learning for causal estimation
- Applied microeconometrics

## Education

I got my Ph.D. in Economics from the University of Nebraska-Lincoln.  I did my undergraduate from Zhejian University.
